About FetchPicks

Our Mission

FetchPicks was created with one simple goal: help pet owners make better buying decisions. The pet market is flooded with thousands of products—some great, some mediocre, and some that aren't worth your money. We cut through the noise and give you honest, data-driven recommendations.

How We Review

Every product we recommend goes through a rigorous evaluation process:

  • Ingredient Analysis — We scrutinize labels, sourcing, and nutritional profiles.
  • Customer Research — We analyze thousands of real customer reviews to identify patterns.
  • Expert Consultation — We reference veterinary guidelines and industry standards.
  • Value Assessment — We compare price vs. quality to find the best value options.

Transparency

FetchPicks participates in the Amazon Services LLC Associates Program. This means that if you click on an affiliate link and make a purchase, we may earn a small commission—at no extra cost to you. This commission helps us maintain the site and continue producing great content.

Importantly: our recommendations are never influenced by commissions. We only recommend products we genuinely believe in, regardless of commission rates. If a product isn't worth buying, we'll tell you.

Contact

Have a question, suggestion, or product you'd like us to review? We'd love to hear from you. Reach out at hello@fetchpicks.com

🐾 FetchPicks

We help pet owners make smarter buying decisions with honest, research-backed product reviews and guides.

FetchPicks is a participant in the Amazon Services LLC Associates Program, an affiliate advertising program designed to provide a means for sites to earn advertising fees by advertising and linking to Amazon.com. As an Amazon Associate we earn from qualifying purchases.
